Purview._comment: Provide YOUR values here, in appsettings.Local.json (git-ignored), or via env vars (TenantId, Purview__AppLocationValue, Purview__DefaultUserObjectId, Purview__ClientId/ClientSecret). Empty values are fine: the agent runs and uses the regex SIT classifier. Mode = Auto (Graph first, regex fallback) | Real (Graph only, error = block) | Fallback (regex only). AppLocationValue = the agent's Entra Application (client) id once provisioned.
Purview.BlockedPromptMessage: Your message was blocked by your organization's Microsoft Purview policy.
Purview.BlockedResponseMessage: The agent's response was withheld by your organization's Microsoft Purview policy.
